title: ProviderResetPathsMethod
description: Contract for provider.resetPaths command. Removes user path override for a provider (scope+purpose) slot, restoring built-in defaults.

scope.description: Scope of the slot to reset

purpose.description: Purpose of the slot to reset

ProviderResetPathsResponse.title: ProviderResetPathsResponse
ProviderResetPathsResponse.description: Result of provider.resetPaths. Errors: validation_error (1001), database_error (1004).

reset.description: True if an override existed and was removed; false if no override was stored
